stylePrefix: dark moody detective game evidence photograph, photorealistic, slightly desaturated colours, subtle film grain, cinematic lighting, no UI chrome or borders, square crop

evidence.name: Office CCTV Still
evidence.prompt: grainy black-and-white CCTV freeze-frame of a woman sitting at an office desk working at a computer, timestamp overlay in bottom-left corner, wide-angle security camera fish-eye distortion, dim office lighting, pixelated low-resolution look, surveillance footage aesthetic

evidence.name: Biometric Keypad Log
evidence.prompt: close-up photograph of a printed thermal paper access control log, black text on white paper slightly curled at edges, shows a thumbprint icon symbol and a timestamp reading 2:16 PM, green LED glow from a keypad in the background, shallow depth of field

evidence.name: Cafe Receipt
evidence.prompt: thermal receipt paper from a cafe named Cafe Lumiere, slightly crumpled, printed line items including one espresso and a price, timestamp showing 3:05 PM, small coffee ring stain in one corner, warm ambient light, paper texture visible

evidence.name: Gallery CCTV Timestamp
evidence.prompt: grainy colour CCTV still image of an art gallery side entrance corridor, a blurred figure in dark clothing entering through a door, glowing green digital timestamp bar along the bottom edge, fish-eye wide-angle lens distortion, low-light security camera aesthetic, slightly washed-out colours, no legible text

evidence.name: Parking Ticket
evidence.prompt: hospital parking garage paper ticket stub photographed on a dark surface, printed rows of thermal text too small to read, barcode stripe across the bottom, bold logo area at top, slightly bent and creased as if taken from a wallet, clean clinical overhead lighting, focus on paper texture and document shape

evidence.name: Medical Lobby Cam
evidence.prompt: hospital reception lobby CCTV frame, completely empty of people, reception desk and waiting chairs visible, bright fluorescent overhead lighting, glowing digital timestamp bar along the bottom, security camera colour footage with slight scan-line effect, institutional clinical atmosphere, no legible text

evidence.name: Fuel Station Receipt
evidence.prompt: crumpled petrol station thermal receipt on a dark surface, fuel pump icon graphic at the top, rows of printed thermal text too small to read, slightly greasy paper texture, harsh spotlight from above, focus on document shape and texture not text content

evidence.name: Forensic Photos
evidence.prompt: overhead crime-scene photograph of a dusty concrete staircase landing, dry dust on the surface showing clear boot-print impressions, small orange numbered evidence marker placard beside the prints, harsh clinical forensic flash lighting, slightly overexposed

evidence.name: Suspect's Boots
evidence.prompt: pair of worn dark brown leather work boots size 10 lying on a stainless steel forensic examination table, boot treads clearly visible and completely dry, white paper evidence tag tied to the lace with string, harsh overhead fluorescent laboratory lighting, high-contrast shadows

evidence.name: Gate Camera
evidence.prompt: black-and-white CCTV footage of a country estate entrance gate, tall stone pillars on either side, iron gates, completely empty driveway with no vehicle or person visible, timestamp overlay, overcast daylight, slightly grainy surveillance aesthetic

evidence.name: Previous Stop Receipt
evidence.prompt: carbon-copy delivery route manifest sheet on slightly yellowed paper, blue carbon-imprint rows of typed text too small to read, a single handwritten ink signature on one numbered line, clipboard metal clip visible at the top, soft overhead light, focus on paper texture and handwriting not text content

evidence.name: Smart Speaker Log
evidence.prompt: close-up of a smartphone screen showing a dark-themed smart home app, vertical list of activity log rows with small icons and blurred illegible text, one row highlighted amber standing out from the rest, bottom of the list empty with no further entries, soft screen glow in a dark room

evidence.name: Victim's Phone
evidence.prompt: cracked smartphone lying face-up on a dark wooden surface, screen glowing showing a lock screen with a missed call notification badge and phone icon, spider-web crack across one corner of the glass, dim moody ambient light from one side, no legible text visible

evidence.name: Train Ticket
evidence.prompt: close-up of a smartphone screen displaying a digital train e-ticket app, large black QR code dominating the centre of the screen, minimalist transit app design, dark background with white card area, slight screen brightness glare, focus on QR code shape not surrounding text

evidence.name: Train Platform Camera
evidence.prompt: colour CCTV footage of a train platform, train visible on left side of frame mid-departure with motion blur, timestamp 6:31 PM in corner, platform almost entirely empty, fluorescent platform lighting, security camera aesthetic

evidence.name: Studio Cam
evidence.prompt: wide-angle CCTV composite of an empty spin cycling studio shown three times side by side as a triptych of sequential freeze-frames, rows of stationary exercise bikes, no people, glowing digital timestamp bars along the bottom of each frame, bright gym fluorescent lighting, fish-eye distortion, no legible text

evidence.name: Victim's Locker
evidence.prompt: open metal gym locker numbered 114, the padlock hanging off the hasp with visible pry damage and broken shackle, locker interior completely empty, harsh overhead fluorescent gym lighting casting hard shadows, clinical and cold atmosphere

evidence.name: Valet Parking Ticket
evidence.prompt: upscale premium valet parking claim ticket on thick cream card stock photographed flat on dark marble, gold foil embossed decorative crest at the top, a large circular red ink timestamp stamp in the centre, printed rows of text too small to read, clean minimalist luxury design, dramatic side lighting

evidence.name: Photo Evidence
evidence.prompt: press photographer candid shot taken at an upscale art gallery evening event, soft bokeh background of well-dressed guests and artwork on walls, a figure in formal evening dress visible in the mid-ground background, digital timestamp watermark in corner, slight film grain, documentary photojournalism style
